name: io.github.pghdma/callrail-mcp
description: CallRail REST API v3 with 49 tools — calls, form submissions, transcripts, full CRUD on tags/trackers/companies/users/notifications, plus agency-specific aggregation tools (usage_summary, compare_periods, bulk_update_calls, spam_detector, call_eligibility_check).

environmentVariables.description: CallRail API key. Get one at Settings > API Keys in your CallRail account (requires Account Admin). Alternatively set CALLRAIL_API_KEY_FILE to a file path containing the key.
environmentVariables.name: CALLRAIL_API_KEY
